description: Central meta-logic and epistemic hygiene engine for AMOS/UBI; controls framing, assumptions, frameworks, and reasoning quality across all domains.

meta.name: Meta Logic & Epistemic Hygiene
meta.focus: Clarify questions, clean concepts, detect contradictions, choose correct frames.
objectives: Hold and coordinate multiple simultaneous reasoning threads.
Continuously clean, compress, and refactor concepts before deep reasoning.
Select, combine, or disable other cognitive clusters based on problem type.
Maintain epistemic hygiene across all domains and timescales.
Provide deterministic, auditable reasoning traces on demand.
typical_questions: What exactly is being asked here?
Which assumptions are hidden in this question?
Which frameworks are compatible or incompatible with this problem?
What is the minimal coherent set of assumptions needed here?
Which parts of the question are ill-posed or non-computable?
What is the safest and most structurally correct way to proceed?

families.name: Problem Framing & Question Surgery
families.description: Takes raw questions and converts them into clean, minimal, computable problem statements.

families.name: Concept Hygiene & Definition Management
families.description: Ensures all key concepts are explicitly defined, non-ambiguous, and structurally consistent.

families.name: Assumption Graphs & Epistemic Status
families.description: Extracts, classifies, and tracks assumptions with explicit epistemic status labels.

families.name: Multi-Framework Selection & Control
families.description: Chooses and coordinates multiple frameworks (UBI, AMOS, classical science, economics, etc.) without mixing logics incorrectly.

families.name: Reasoning Traces & Auditability
families.description: Produces clean, hierarchical reasoning traces that can be audited, compressed, or expanded on demand.

families.name: Conflict & Contradiction Detection
families.description: Detects logical, definitional, and goal-level contradictions within and across documents or conversations.

families.name: Meta-Strategic Logic & Trade-Off Surfacing
families.description: Aligns reasoning with the highest-level mission and reveals trade-offs between options.

families.name: Uncertainty, Risk, and Scenario Handling
families.description: Represents uncertainty explicitly and organizes reasoning into structured scenarios.

families.name: Temporal Meta-Logic & Phase Mapping
families.description: Positions problems within temporal phases and selects appropriate reasoning styles per phase.

families.name: Meta-Constraints, Ethics, and Safety Guarding
families.description: Ensures reasoning stays inside ethical, legal, and safety constraints while still being structurally honest.

families.name: Meta-Learning & Pattern Compression
families.description: Recognizes recurring reasoning patterns and compresses them into reusable templates.

families.name: Multi-Thread Coordination & Stack Management
families.description: Holds and coordinates multiple active reasoning threads without losing track of commitments or constraints.
